description_long: This object is a streamlined airplane with a smooth, elongated fuselage and a slightly pointed nose. The wings are mounted low on the body and extend outward with a slight backward sweep, giving the aircraft a modern, aerodynamic appearance. The tail section features a horizontal stabilizer with a small vertical fin, forming a T-tail configuration. The windows are rendered as a continuous, light blue strip along the side, suggesting a passenger or cargo compartment. The landing gear is minimally visible, with small wheels protruding beneath the fuselage. The overall surface is matte and light gray, with subtle blue highlights on the windows.
description: A sleek, light gray airplane with low-mounted swept wings, a T-tail, and a continuous blue window strip along the fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the blue window strip.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the T-tail configuration and the full wingspan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the wing and window features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit area, and the forward sweep of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior of the fuselage or wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, partially visible and likely fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the nose section with a continuous window strip.
